mapper.select:
SELECT w.warning_id AS alertId, w.warning_time AS warningTime, w.warning_level AS alertLevel, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS alertLevelText, w.handle_status AS alertStatus, CASE w.handle_status WHEN 0 THEN '待确认' WHEN 1 THEN '待处理' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '已处理' WHEN 4 THEN '已忽略' ELSE '未知' END AS alertStatusText, w.warning_type AS warningType, w.warning_desc AS warningDesc, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 3 THEN '建议关联检查：肌钙蛋白、CK-MB、电解质、D-二聚体' WHEN 2 THEN '建议关联检查：心肌酶谱、电解质、BNP' ELSE '建议结合常规检验结果进行综合评估' END AS lisHint, w.handle_user_name AS handleUserName, w.handle_time AS handleTime, w.handle_opinion AS handleRemark,
p.patient_id AS patientId, COALESCE(w.patient_name, p.patient_name) AS patientName, COALESCE(w.age, p.age) AS age, CASE WHEN w.gender IS NOT NULL AND w.gender != '' THEN w.gender WHEN p.gender = 1 THEN '男' WHEN p.gender = 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS genderText, COALESCE(w.inpatient_no, p.inpatient_no) AS inpatientNo, COALESCE(w.dept_name, p.ward_name) AS wardName, COALESCE(p.bed_no, c.bed_no) AS bedNo, p.phone AS phone, p.primary_diagnosis AS primaryDiagnosis,
c.record_id AS recordId, c.ecg_no AS ecgNo, c.device_id AS deviceId, c.device_name AS deviceName, c.lead_count AS leadCount, c.sampling_rate AS samplingRate, c.collection_duration AS collectionDuration, c.collection_start_time AS collectionStartTime, c.collection_end_time AS collectionEndTime, c.ecg_data_file_url AS ecgDataFileUrl, c.upload_source_file_url AS uploadSourceFileUrl,
a.ai_diagnosis_id AS aiDiagnosisId, a.diagnosis_no AS diagnosisNo, a.ai_model_version AS aiModelVersion, a.ai_conclusion AS aiConclusion, a.heart_rate AS heartRate, a.pr_interval AS prInterval, a.qrs_duration AS qrsDuration, a.qt_interval AS qtInterval, a.qtc_interval AS qtcInterval, a.abnormal_type AS abnormalType, a.abnormal_count AS abnormalCount, a.abnormal_level AS abnormalLevel, CASE a.abnormal_level WHEN 0 THEN '正常' WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS abnormalLevelText, a.confidence AS confidence, a.analysis_status AS analysisStatus, CASE a.analysis_status WHEN 0 THEN '待分析' WHEN 1 THEN '分析中' WHEN 2 THEN '已完成' WHEN 3 THEN '失败' ELSE '未知' END AS analysisStatusText, a.diagnosis_time AS diagnosisTime FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w LEFT JOIN patient_info p ON w.patient_id = p.patient_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_collection_record c ON w.record_id = c.record_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_ai_diagnosis a ON ( (w.ai_diagnosis_id IS NOT NULL AND a.ai_diagnosis_id = w.ai_diagnosis_id) OR (w.ai_diagnosis_id IS NULL AND c.record_id IS NOT NULL AND a.record_id = c.record_id) ) AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE w.warning_id = #{alertId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.diagnosis_time DESC, a.ai_diagnosis_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT w.ward_id AS wardId, w.ward_name AS wardName, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.is_abnormal = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS normalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.is_abnormal = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS abnormalCount FROM sys_ward w LEFT JOIN ecg_collection_record c ON c.dept_id = w.ward_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_ai_diagnosis a ON a.record_id = c.record_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.analysis_status = 2 WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.status = 1 GROUP BY w.ward_id, w.ward_name, w.sort_num ORDER BY w.sort_num ASC, w.ward_id ASC

SELECT '高危' AS level, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.warning_level = 3 ) AS count UNION ALL SELECT '中危' AS level, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.warning_level = 2 ) AS count UNION ALL SELECT '低危' AS level, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.warning_level = 1 ) AS count

SELECT w.warning_type AS warningType, COUNT(1) AS count FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.warning_type IS NOT NULL AND w.warning_type != '' GROUP BY w.warning_type ORDER BY count DESC, warningType ASC

SELECT '草稿' AS status, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.report_status = 0 ) AS count UNION ALL SELECT '待审核' AS status, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.report_status = 1 ) AS count UNION ALL SELECT '已完成' AS status, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.report_status IN (2, 3, 4) ) AS count

SELECT '在线' AS dimension, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.device_id) FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.monitor_status IN (1, 2) ) AS count UNION ALL SELECT '在用' AS dimension, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.device_id) FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 ) AS count UNION ALL SELECT '空闲' AS dimension, ( SELECT IF(t.totalCount - t.inUseCount > 0, t.totalCount - t.inUseCount, 0) FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.is_deleted = 0) AS totalCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.device_id) FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0) AS inUseCount ) t ) AS count UNION ALL SELECT '离线' AS dimension, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.device_status = 4 ) AS count
SELECT CAST(w.ward_id AS CHAR) AS value, w.ward_name AS label FROM sys_ward w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.status = 1 ORDER BY w.sort_num ASC, w.ward_id ASC
